phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the church opens today
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ouvre l'église aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR OOV-ruh lay-GLEEZ oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Ouen has set visiting hours that may differ from regular service times.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are organ concerts scheduled
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a des concerts d'orgue prévus ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess keel ee ah day kohn-SAIR DORG pray-VOO
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Ouen has one of the finest organs in France. Concerts are held periodically.

responses.english: You need to check on the website.
responses.phonetic: eel foh vay-ree-FYAY soor luh SEET ahn-tair-NET
responses.french: Il faut vérifier sur le site internet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an entry fee
phrases.cultural_note: Most churches in France are free to enter.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if concerts are held here
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des concerts ou récitals d'orgue dans cette abbatiale ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day kohn-SAIR oo ray-see-TAL DOR-guh dahn set ah-bah-TYAL
phrases.cultural_note: Saint-Ouen regularly hosts organ recitals, choral concerts, and classical music performances. The acoustic quality of the vast Gothic interior makes it one of the finest concert venues in Normandy.

responses.english: You need to check the programme on the website.
responses.phonetic: eel foh vay-ree-FYAY luh proh-GRAM soor luh SEET
responses.french: Il faut vérifier le programme sur le site.

phrases.text_local: Les jardins autour de l'abbatiale sont-ils accessibles au public ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay zhar-DAHN oh-TOOR duh lah-bah-TYAL sohn-teel ak-ses-EEBL oh poo-BLEEK
phrases.cultural_note: The formal French gardens surrounding Saint-Ouen are one of Rouen's most peaceful spots. They are freely accessible during daylight hours and offer a lovely view of the church's flying buttresses and flamboyant chevet.

responses.english: Yes, the gardens are open, through the side door.
responses.phonetic: wee lay zhar-DAHN sohn too-VAIR par lah PORT lah-tay-RAHL
responses.french: Oui, les jardins sont ouverts, par la porte latérale.
